reasoning: The control 'Leverage unique passwords for all user accounts' pertains to password management and policy enforcement, which is typically handled by Identity and Access Management (IAM) systems in cloud environments. Kubernetes itself does not manage user passwords directly, as it relies on external identity providers for authentication, often using mechanisms like OpenID Connect (OIDC) or integrating with cloud IAM services. Therefore, there is no direct equivalent in Kubernetes for enforcing unique passwords, as this is outside the scope of Kubernetes' native capabilities.
title: Leverage unique passwords for all user accounts
